basic_details.job_title: MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science, M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science
qualification.details: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science with an aptitude for Laser based research and having good communication skills. Candidates with UGC JRF/ NET, GATE will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Technical Assistant / Project Assistant: ₹17,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.mahatma_gandhi_university_mgu: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science, M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science

content_sections.heading: MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MGU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science with an aptitude for Laser based research and having good communication skills. Candidates with UGC JRF/ NET, GATE will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Technical Assistant / Project Assistant: ₹17,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post is 04 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post in the Mahatma Gandhi University recruitment drive. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant recruitment is Email. Interested candidates need to send their applications along with required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post should not be more than 35 years of age. Age will be calculated as on 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post at MGU?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant position at Mahatma Gandhi University will receive a salary of Rs. 17,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc in Physics/ Photonics/ Instrumentation/ Materials Science or M.Tech in Nano science and Nano-technology/ Materials Science. An aptitude for Laser based research and good communication skills are also required.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Technical Assistant / Project Assistant at MGU?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post at MGU primarily involves an Interview, followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the MGU Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Technical Assistant / Project Assistant post is Kottayam, Kerala. Mahatma Gandhi University is located in Kottayam, Pincode 686560.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU)?
faq.answer: The official website for Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) is www.mgu.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and official updates regarding the recruitment.
